plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Software development workflow skills — ideate projects, design features, implement from plans, profile and optimize performance, refactor codebases with bold architectural reconceptions, extract patterns, design tests, and ship releases.

plugins.name: nates-toolkit
plugins.description: Standalone, project-agnostic utility skills with no workflow lock-in — plainspeak (plain-language re-explanation), repo-eval (codebase scorecard), agent-reflection (self-reflection on tool & skill usage), write-tool-skill + skill-auditor (skill authoring and quality auditing).

plugins.name: agile-workflow
plugins.description: Markdown-based work-tracking substrate for AI-driven projects. Items as files in .work/, late-binding releases, gates that produce items, goal-backed autopilot queue runner.

plugins.name: ux-ui-design
plugins.description: HTML/CSS/JS mockup-first UI/UX design. Generate multi-option screen mockups, multi-page user flows, and design-system palettes as throwaway single-file mockups in .mockups/ for alignment before implementation. Loosely integrates with agile-workflow.

plugins.name: krometrail
plugins.description: Runtime debugging for AI agents — debug 10 languages via DAP, record and control Chrome via CDP.

plugins.name: peeragent
plugins.description: Delegate arbitrary task work between local coding agents — any host (Claude Code, Codex) can call any peer (Codex, Claude Code, or Gemini through Antigravity). Ships the peer and peer-review skills.
